featuredHotels.name: Inara Alas Harum
featuredHotels.tagline: A serene boutique retreat surrounded by the natural beauty of Ubud
featuredHotels.description: Set among tropical greenery and peaceful rice-field scenery, Inara Alas Harum offers an intimate Bali escape with elegant accommodation, a beautiful swimming pool and easy access to Ubud’s cultural attractions.
featuredHotels.price: Contact BENARIAN directly for our best available price

featuredHotels.name: Royal Tulip Springhill Resort Jimbaran
featuredHotels.tagline: A spacious tropical resort close to the beaches of southern Bali
featuredHotels.description: Royal Tulip Springhill Resort Jimbaran combines spacious rooms and suites, landscaped gardens and excellent resort facilities in a convenient Jimbaran location—ideal for couples, families and relaxed Bali holidays.
featuredHotels.price: Contact BENARIAN directly for our best available price
